With Altice France SA now set to be sold in transactions that may fetch €24 billion ($28 billion), the true economics of that restructuring are being revealed. Drahi — of course — emerges as the winner.

The show features prominent leaders spanning the worlds of business, finance, politics and culture. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: BP Oil Trading Revenue Boosted by Iran War
title_cn: 伊朗战争增加了英国石油公司石油贸易收入
summary: BP said earnings jumped in the first quarter as spiraling energy prices and market turmoil triggered by the Iran war led to a surge in profits from its oil trading operation. Bloomberg's Mitchell Ferman reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: ECB Shouldn't Think About Raising Rates, BNY Says
title_cn: 纽约银行表示欧洲央行不应考虑加息
summary: Geoffrey Yu, senior market strategist at BNY, discusses the outlook for the energy sector and how it could impact Thursday's interest-rate decision by the European Central Bank. "The last thing that the ECB should be thinking about, I think, is tightening rates," he tells Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: BYD, Geely Results to Shape Path of China EV Stock Rivalry

summary: Chinese EV stocks face a key test in upcoming results, which will offer clues for investors betting on the recently diverging performance of major players.

title_cn: 尽管债务负担激增，中国仍获得穆迪的支持
summary: Moody’s Ratings revised China’s credit outlook to stable from negative, an expression of confidence in the economy as the government copes with risks stemming from its swelling debt load.

title: Tech Drags Stocks Lower as Brent Tops $110 Again: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 布伦特原油再次突破 110 美元，科技股拖累股市走低：市场总结
summary: Technology stocks led global equity markets lower as concerns over whether the vast amount of investment in artificial intelligence will pay off resurfaced. Oil kept on rising as the Strait of Hormuz remained shut.

title: Yen Erases Gains as BOJ’s Ueda Fails to Give Clear Hike Signal
title_cn: 由于日本央行上田未能发出明确的加息信号，日元回吐涨幅
summary: The yen gave back its gains against the dollar after Governor Kazuo Ueda refrained from giving a decisive signal about the timing of a rate hike following the Bank of Japan’s split decision to keep interest rates unchanged.

title: Spain’s Jobless Rate Increases the Most Since the Pandemic
title_cn: 西班牙失业率创大流行以来最大增幅
summary: Spain’s unemployment rate saw the biggest quarterly increase since the pandemic, in a rare setback for the euro area’s best-performing major economy.

title: BOJ Holds in Shock Split Vote & Merz Says Trump 'Humiliated' By Iran | Daybreak Europe 4/28/2026
title_cn: 日本央行举行令人震惊的分裂投票，默茨称特朗普被伊朗“羞辱”黎明欧洲 4/28/2026
summary:
Bloomberg Daybreak Europe is your essential morning viewing to stay ahead. Live from London, we set the agenda for your day, catching you up with overnight markets news from the US and Asia.

On today's show, the Bank of Japan has held its benchmark interest rate, but the shock split vote raises the chance of a hike in June. Three policymakers voted to raise rates, as risks mount from the war in Iran and surging energy prices. The Bank also raised its core inflation forecast for this fiscal year more than expected, to 2.8%.

The German Chancellor Friedrich Merz says the US is being 'humiliated' by Iran, as President Trump struggles to negotiate an end to the war.

And UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer is facing a possible investigation into whether he misled Parliament about the appointment of Peter Mandelson as US ambassador.

Today's guest: Frédérique Carrier, RBC Wealth Management, Investment Strategy UK & Asia Head (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Tiger Global-Backed Spinny Said to Hire Banks for Indian IPO
title_cn: Tiger Global支持的Spinny据称将聘请银行进行印度IPO
summary: Valuedrive Technologies Pvt. Ltd., which operates the Indian used-car marketplace Spinny, is weighing an initial public offering in Mumbai and has engaged investment banks for the process, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Congo Plans Paramilitary Unit for Mines With US, UAE Funding
title_cn: 刚果计划在美国和阿联酋的资助下建立准军事部队
summary: The Democratic Republic of Congo will create a paramilitary unit to police its mines with funding from the US and United Arab Emirates, the country’s General Inspectorate of Mines said.

title: Shin-Etsu Withholds Annual Outlook Due to Iran War Disruptions
title_cn: 信越因伊朗战争中断而暂缓年度展望
summary: Shin-Etsu Chemical Co. withheld its full-year forecast, citing supply constraints and price fluctuations stemming from the war in the Middle East.

title: Gulf Urea Output Drops With Lack of Fertilizer Ships to Load
title_cn: 由于缺乏化肥船舶装载，海湾地区尿素产量下降
summary: More than half of the Middle East’s urea output may have been lost since the start of the Iran conflict, which is continuing to disrupt fertilizer flows from the region and threatening global food inflation.

title: China State Refiners Seek to Resume Fuel Exports After Halt
title_cn: 中国国有炼油厂寻求在暂停后恢复燃料出口
summary: China’s state-owned refiners have begun applying for government permits that would allow them to resume fuel exports in May, citing plentiful domestic stockpiles.

title: Bank Shares Drop After Indian Regulator Tightens Bad Loan Norms
title_cn: 印度监管机构收紧不良贷款规范后银行股下跌
summary: Shares of Indian lenders fell after the regulator tightened rules that will require banks to set aside more capital against potential losses on their loan and credit portfolios.

title: EQT Raises €3.1 Billion for New European Real Estate Fund
title_cn: EQT 为新欧洲房地产基金筹集 31 亿欧元
summary: EQT AB has raised €3.1 billion ($3.6 billion) for its latest European real estate fund despite a challenging fundraising climate for the wider sector.

title: Gold Retreats as Traders Weigh Diplomatic Push to End Iran War
title_cn: 交易商权衡通过外交手段结束伊朗战争，金价回落
summary: Gold declined as the Strait of Hormuz stayed largely closed to shipping, despite the latest efforts to find a negotiated solution to the US-Iran war that’s choked energy supplies and heightened inflation risks.

title: First LNG Shipment Since War Began Appears to Exit Hormuz
title_cn: 自战争开始以来第一批液化天然气似乎已离开霍尔木兹
summary: The first liquefied natural gas shipment since the war in the Middle East began two months ago appears to have traversed the Strait of Hormuz to exit the Persian Gulf.

title: UAE Tells Some Oil Buyers to Pick Up Gulf Supply Outside Hormuz
title_cn: 阿联酋告诉一些石油买家在霍尔木兹以外地区购买海湾供应
summary: Abu Dhabi National Oil Co. has informed some term customers of the availability of cargoes for loading off Fujairah, outside the Persian Gulf, as producers explore different routes to bring their oil to market.

title: UBS Using Party Funding to Press Swiss Lawmakers, Minister Says
title_cn: 部长称瑞银利用政党资金向瑞士立法者施压
summary: Some Swiss lawmakers are afraid UBS Group AG might cut support for their parties if they speak up in support of the government’s sweeping banking reforms, according to the finance minister.

title: Horizons Middle East & Africa 4/28/2026
title_cn: 中东和非洲地平线 4/28/2026
summary: Horizons Middle East & Africa is your daily spotlight on one of the world's fastest-growing regions. Live from Dubai, we bring you the latest global markets and analysis, plus news-making interviews, with a special focus on MEA. All that and more, as you head to the office in the Gulf, pause for lunch in Hong Kong, or start your day in London or Johannesburg.  (Source: Bloomberg)

He speaks with Haslinda Amin from the sidelines of the 'Bank of America Conference' in Singapore. (Source: Bloomberg)

summary: Fortescue Deputy Chairman Mark Barnaba speaks to Bloomberg TV about rising costs from the Iran war, China’s growing influence, and the miner's push to replace diesel with renewable energy. Barnaba speaks to Bloomberg's Haslinda Amin exclusively from the Bank of America’s Breakthrough Technology Dialogue Asia Pacific in Singapore. (Source: Bloomberg)

Bloomberg TV is live from Tokyo and Sydney with Shery Ahn and Haidi Stroud-Watts, getting insight and analysis from newsmakers and industry leaders on the biggest stories shaping global markets. (Source: Bloomberg)

title_cn: 伊朗油轮聚集在美国封锁线附近
summary: Tankers laden with Iranian oil are clustering off Chabahar, a port in Iran that’s outside the Persian Gulf but just shy of the US blockade line.

title_cn: 霍尔木兹海峡仍关闭，美国权衡伊朗提案，油价上涨
summary: Oil edged higher as traders weighed the next steps toward peace talks over the Iran war, with the US discussing a proposal from Tehran while the crucial Strait of Hormuz remained almost impassable.

title_cn: 随着外汇损失的增加，人民币升值对中国收益构成压力
summary: Foreign-exchange losses from yuan conversions are weighing on Chinese companies’ profits, underscoring the currency’s strength as an emerging risk for earnings.

title: Beijing Blocks Meta‑Manus Deal That’s Already Done | The China Show 4/28/2026
title_cn: 北京阻止已经完成的 Meta-Manus 交易 |中国展 2026 年 4 月 28 日
summary: “Bloomberg: The China Show” is your definitive source for news and analysis on the world's second-biggest economy. From politics and policy to tech and trends, David Ingles and Avril Hong give global investors unique insight, delivering in-depth discussions with the newsmakers who matter. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Xi Tests China’s Reach by Blocking Meta Deal That’s Already Done
title_cn: 习近平通过阻止已经完成的元交易来测试中国的影响力
summary: China has sought for years to exert influence over business deals beyond its home turf. Still, its decision to press Meta Platforms Inc. to unwind a $2 billion acquisition of AI startup Manus marks a step unlike anything it’s tried before.

title: Japan Industry Group Warns of War’s Impact on Supply of Thinners
title_cn: 日本工业集团警告战争对稀释剂供应的影响
summary: The outlook for supply of thinners and cutting oils — materials used in the production of a wide range of products from chips to cars to planes — is becoming increasingly uncertain, according to a Japanese machine tool industry group.

title: BofA’s Guenthardt on M&A Deals and IPO Pipeline in Asia
title_cn: 美国银行的 Guenthardt 谈亚洲的并购交易和 IPO 计划
summary: Peter Guenthardt, Head of APAC Global Corporate and Investment Banking at Bank of America, discusses the outlook for deals in Asia in light of the Iran war. He also shares the company’s hiring plans in the region. He speaks exclusively with Haslinda Amin from the sidelines of the “BofA Breakthrough Technology Dialogue” conference on Insight with Haslinda Amin. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: OpenAI Misses Its Own User and Sales Goals, WSJ Reports
title_cn: 据《华尔街日报》报道，OpenAI 未能实现自己的用户和销售目标
summary: OpenAI recently failed to meet its own goals for new user acquisition and sales, fueling internal concerns that the company may struggle to support its spending on AI infrastructure, the Wall Street Journal reported.

title: Optical Computing Firm Lightelligence Jumps 408% in HK Debut
title_cn: 光计算公司 Lightelligence 在香港上市首日大涨 408%
summary: Lightelligence, a Chinese optical-computing provider, surged in its Hong Kong trading debut, underscoring investor interest in an industry seen as critical to supplying parts for the artificial-intelligence buildout.

title: South Korean Lawmakers Condemn US Pressure Over Coupang Probe
title_cn: 韩国议员谴责美国对 Coupang 调查施加的压力
summary: South Korean lawmakers protested what they described as US political pressure over a legal case involving Coupang Inc., with about 90 legislators planning to deliver a formal complaint to the US ambassador.

title_cn: 美国银行关于商业战略和人工智能作用的 Mensah
summary: Bernard Mensah, President of International at Bank of America, discusses the bank's international business strategy and the role of AI and technology. He speaks with Haslinda Amin from the sidelines of the Bank of America’s Breakthrough Technology Dialogue in Singapore. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Advantest Shares Decline After Outlook Misses on Tight Capacity
title_cn: 产能紧张，展望未达预期，爱德万测试股价下跌
summary: Advantest Corp.’s stock dropped as much as 6.9% after the maker of AI chip testers gave a lackluster outlook and pointed to continued capacity constraints.

title: Musk v. Altman Jurors ‘Rose Up to the Plate,’ Judge Seats Nine
title_cn: 马斯克诉奥特曼案陪审员“挺身而出”，法官席位九人
summary: Nine jurors were seated Monday in the AI industry’s closely watched trial between Elon Musk and OpenAI chief Sam Altman from a pool of San Francisco Bay Area residents who are expected to hear three weeks of testimony in federal court.

title: Dynatrace Rallies on Report That Starboard Value Took a Stake
title_cn: Dynatrace 因 Starboard Value 入股的报道而上涨
summary: Dynatrace Inc. shares rose more than 6% in late trading on a report that Starboard Value LP took a stake and is pushing the company to better capitalize on the shift to artificial intelligence.

title: Monroe's Koenig: AI Will Make Select Software Better
title_cn: Monroe 的 Koenig：人工智能将使精选软件变得更好
summary: "There's a lot less anxiety" in the private credit landscape says Monroe Capital Chairman & CEO Ted Koenig. He joined Romaine Bostick and Katie Greifeld on "The Close" to discuss his outlook on private credit and the real but misdiagnosed AI risk. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Stocks, Nvidia Close at Record Highs Ahead of Tech Earnings
title_cn: 美国股市和英伟达在科技财报公布前收于历史新高
summary: US stocks eked out small gains on Monday to renew their record levels with Nvidia Corp. hitting a fresh high, as investors prepare for a swath of corporate earnings this week while monitoring developments in the Strait of Hormuz. A gauge of chip stocks finished lower after a historic run.

title: Match Invests $100 Million in Grindr Rival Sniffies With Option to Buy
title_cn: Match 投资 1 亿美元购买 Grindr Rival Sniffies，并可选择购买
summary: Match Group Inc., whose dating-app portfolio includes brands like Hinge, Tinder and Match.com, is investing $100 million in Sniffies, a platform for queer men, paving the way for a possible acquisition.

title: OpenAI Drops Exclusivity Deal with Microsoft | Bloomberg Tech 4/27/2026
title_cn: OpenAI 放弃与微软的独家协议 |彭博科技 2026 年 4 月 27 日
summary: Bloomberg’s Ed Ludlow discusses Microsoft’s and OpenAI’s decision to drop exclusivity rights on AI models in a move that opens the doors for the rivals to make new deals. Plus, China blocks Meta's $2 billion purchase of AI startup Manus. And, the feud between Elon Musk and Sam Altman heads to court with the Tesla CEO alleging OpenAI abandoned its founding mission. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Joby Tests Air Taxis Between JFK Airport and Manhattan
title_cn: 乔比测试肯尼迪机场和曼哈顿之间的空中出租车
summary: Joby Aviation is flying electric air taxis between John F. Kennedy International Airport and Manhattan this week to show off its quieter, zero-emission aircraft in a city weary of noise pollution. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Joby Tests Air Taxis Between JFK Airport and Manhattan
title_cn: 乔比测试肯尼迪机场和曼哈顿之间的空中出租车
summary: Joby Aviation is flying electric air taxis between John F. Kennedy International Airport and Manhattan this week to show off its quieter, zero-emission aircraft in a city weary of noise pollution. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Big Job Cuts Come Ahead of Big Tech Earnings
title_cn: 科技巨头盈利之前大幅裁员
summary: Microsoft and Meta have announced plans that could reduce their workforces by thousands ahead of releasing their quarterly earnings later this week. Sarah Franklin, CEO of the human resources platform Lattice, says "Tokenmaxxing", AI use and large job cuts aren’t the right things to focus on to free up capital. She joins Ed Ludlow on “Bloomberg Tech.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: NBA’s Vegas, Seattle Push Gains Steam With Potential Bidders
title_cn: NBA 维加斯和西雅图竞标活动吸引了潜在竞标者
summary: The National Basketball Association has received signs of interest from multiple investor groups for new teams in Las Vegas and Seattle that the league plans to sell for as much as $10 billion, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Musk, Altman Feud Heads to Court Over Future of OpenAI
title_cn: 马斯克与 Altman 因 OpenAI 未来不和告上法庭
summary: Jury selection begins in the legal battle between Elon Musk and Sam Altman over the corporate structure of OpenAI, in a case that could determine the company’s future. Dorothy Lund, professor of law at Columbia Law School specializing in corporate governance, joins Ed Ludlow on “Bloomberg Tech.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Is Doubling Down on Tech Deals with the Gulf: Helberg
title_cn: 赫尔伯格：美国正在加倍加大与海湾地区的技术交易力度
summary: Under Secretary of State for Economic Affairs Jacob Helberg says the US is doubling down on partnerships with Gulf countries, and the conflict in the Middle East only highlights the need for international partnerships that shore up the tech supply chain. Helberg joins Ed Ludlow on “Bloomberg Tech.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Markets Are Ignoring Rising War Risks: Patterson
title_cn: 帕特森：市场忽视了不断上升的战争风险
summary: Markets are hitting all-time highs—but Rebecca Patterson, a former chief investment strategist at Bridgewater who's now a senior fellow at the Council on Foreign Relations. is warning that  investors may be ignoring serious geopolitical risks. From the ticking clock on oil supply disruptions to the fragile AI boom, she explains why today’s rally could face sudden reality checks if global tensions escalate or growth assumptions falter. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Google’s AI Power Over Android Ecosystem Targeted by EU
title_cn: 欧盟瞄准谷歌人工智能对安卓生态系统的影响力
summary: Google was targeted by European Union watchdogs who unveiled a slate of proposals aimed at prising open its Android ecosystem to rivals’ AI services.

title: Hasbro ‘Magic: The Gathering’ Video Game Staff Try to Unionize
title_cn: 孩之宝《万智牌》视频游戏员工试图成立工会
summary: More than 100 employees at Hasbro Inc. who are involved in designing the video game rendition of the popular card game Magic: The Gathering are forming plans to unionize with the Communications Workers of America.

title: Apple, Google Crushed California Bill Helping Smaller Rivals
title_cn: 苹果、谷歌粉碎了加州法案，帮助规模较小的竞争对手
summary: Some of the world’s largest technology companies swiftly quashed a California legislative measure that pitted giants like Apple Inc. and Google against smaller rivals, a display of their immense political influence in their home state.

title: Google Staff Urge Pichai to Refuse Classified Military AI Work
title_cn: 谷歌员工敦促皮查伊拒绝机密军事人工智能工作
summary: Hundreds of AI researchers at Alphabet Inc.’s Google have signed onto a letter urging Chief Executive Officer Sundar Pichai to refuse to make the company’s artificial intelligence systems available for classified workloads for US defense missions, according to organizers of the effort.

title: Germany Suspects Russia Behind Cyberattack on Top Officials
title_cn: 德国怀疑俄罗斯是对高级官员进行网络攻击的幕后黑手
summary: Germany suspects Russia is behind a cyberattack that targeted top decision makers in Berlin via the Signal messaging app, according to a government official in Berlin.

title: Apple Store Union Workers at Closing Location Accuse Company of Retaliation
title_cn: 苹果商店关闭地点的工会工人指责公司进行报复
summary: Union representatives said Apple denied workers the ability to easily transfer to other locations, in a departure from its typical practice.

title: Verizon Reports Phone Subscriber Gains Under New CEO
title_cn: Verizon 报告称，在新任首席执行官的领导下，手机用户数量有所增加
summary: Verizon Communications Inc. surprised analysts Monday when it reported a gain of mobile subscribers, an early signal that new Chief Executive Officer Dan Schulman’s strategy for recapturing market share is already paying off.

title: China Vows Stronger Energy Security With Iran Peace Deal Elusive
title_cn: 伊朗和平协议遥不可及，中国誓言加强能源安全
summary: China’s top leaders pledged to counter external shocks and enhance energy security, while highlighting better-than-expected growth so far this year after the Iran war caused turmoil in global energy markets.

title: Starmer Counts on Labour Support Ahead of Mandelson Showdown
title_cn: 斯塔默在曼德尔森摊牌之前依靠工党的支持
summary: Any hope that Keir Starmer had of putting aside the Peter Mandelson saga will have to wait as the British prime minister braces for another day of parliamentary inquiry into his disastrous appointment of Mandelson as ambassador to the US.

title: Russia Bet Backfires for Mali as Rebels Retake Key Desert Town
title_cn: 俄罗斯押注马里，叛军夺回重要沙漠城镇，结果适得其反
summary: Insurgents recaptured a Malian town that had become a symbol of Russia’s promise to deliver security where Western forces had failed.

title: Austria Extends Bank Tax in €5.1 Billion Plan to Meet EU Budget Rules
title_cn: 奥地利延长银行税 51 亿欧元计划以满足欧盟预算规则
summary: Austria’s government coalition agreed on €5.1 billion ($6 billion) worth of budget steps, including extending a special tax on banks, as part of a two-year framework that seeks to end a European Union probe of its finances.

title: Trump Convenes Security Team to Discuss Iran's Proposal
title_cn: 特朗普召集安全团队讨论伊朗的提议
summary: President Donald Trump convened his national security team to discuss Iran’s proposal to end a war now in its third month and which has left thousands dead across the Middle East, as well as disrupted energy supplies. Bloomberg's Joumanna Bercetche has the latest. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: UK's Starmer Faces Vote on Potential Mandelson Probe
title_cn: 英国斯塔默面临对潜在曼德尔森调查的投票
summary: UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer faces a high-stakes vote on Tuesday on whether to begin an investigation into his assurances to Parliament that due process had been followed in the appointment of Peter Mandelson as ambassador to the US. Bloomberg Opinion's Rosa Prince has more. Her views are her own. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Why Merz Comments Could Further Harm EU-US Relations
title_cn: 为什么梅尔茨的言论可能进一步损害欧美关系
summary: German Chancellor Friedrich Merz said the US is being “humiliated” by Iranian leaders as President Donald Trump struggles to negotiate an end to the war. Speaking to a group of students yesterday, Merz said an “entire nation is being humiliated by the Iranian leadership, particularly by these so-called Revolutionary Guards." The comments risk driving a wedge in transatlantic relations. Bloomberg's Balazs Penz reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: India Says Mideast War Complicates Chabahar Talks With US, Iran
title_cn: 印度称中东战争使与美国和伊朗的恰巴哈尔谈判变得复杂
summary: India said the war in the Middle East is a “complicating factor” as it holds talks with both Washington and Tehran over options to safeguard its $120 million investment in Iran’s Chabahar port.

title: Jimmy Kimmel Defends Joke After Trump Calls for His Firing
title_cn: 特朗普呼吁解雇吉米·金梅尔后，他为笑话辩护
summary: Late night host Jimmy Kimmel defended comments he made during a broadcast last week that prompted President Donald Trump to call for him to be fired.

title: Trump’s Family and Friends Help Revive a Former Balkan Pariah
title_cn: 特朗普的家人和朋友帮助复兴前巴尔干贱民
summary: In an interview, the former president of Republika Srpska says he’s counting on the US administration to change the “narrative” about Bosnian Serbs.

title: UK Graduates Turn to Emergency Degrees to Ride Out Jobs Crisis
title_cn: 英国毕业生转向紧急学位以度过就业危机
summary: Demand for master’s courses has surged amid high levels of youth unemployment

title: Kim Jong Un Confirms Soldier ‘Self-Blasting’ Policy in Ukraine
title_cn: 金正恩确认乌克兰士兵“自爆”政策
summary: North Korean leader Kim Jong Un confirmed a policy that requires soldiers to commit suicide on the battlefield to avoid capture, while fighting Russia’s war against Ukraine.

title: Trump Discusses Iran Proposal With Aides, White House Says
title_cn: 白宫称特朗普与助手讨论伊朗提议
summary: The White House said US officials were discussing Iran’s latest proposal but maintained “red lines” on any deal to end the eight-week war, including preventing Tehran from obtaining a nuclear weapon.

title: Mexico Arrests Cartel Boss With $5 Million US Bounty on Head
title_cn: 墨西哥悬赏 500 万美元逮捕贩毒集团头目
summary: Mexico arrested a senior underworld figure with a $5 million bounty on his head who was sought for crimes including drug trafficking and defrauding US pensioners.

title: Why the Hormuz Crisis Is Raising Concerns About the Malacca Strait
title_cn: 为什么霍尔木兹危机引起人们对马六甲海峡的担忧
summary: Disruptions to shipping in the Strait of Hormuz have raised concerns about vulnerabilities in another critical maritime corridor half a world away. The Strait of Malacca — a narrow stretch of water between Indonesia and Malaysia that funnels trade past Singapore — carries more than a fifth of global maritime trade and is the world’s busiest chokepoint.

title: US Being ‘Humiliated’ in Iran Talks, German Leader Says
title_cn: 德国领导人称美国在伊朗谈判中受到“羞辱”
summary: The US is being “humiliated” by Iranian leaders as President Donald Trump struggles to negotiate an end to the war, German Chancellor Friedrich Merz said in comments that risk driving a further wedge in transatlantic relations. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: White House Security in Spotlight | Balance of Power: Late Edition 04/27/2026
title_cn: 白宫安全成为焦点 |权力平衡：最新版 04/27/2026
summary: "Balance of Power: Late Edition" focuses on the intersection of politics and global business. On today's show, Donell Harvin, former DC Chief of Homeland Security and Intelligence, shares his reaction to the White House Correspondent's Dinner assassination attempt. CBO Director Phillip Swagel discusses how the long term fiscal outlook of the United States is looking and the adjustments the CBO has had to make to their ten year outlook following the US Supreme Court striking down on President Trump's global tariffs and the President launching a war with Iran. Congressman Troy Downing (R-MT) talks about the latest on US Iran talks and lawmakers considering a FISA extension. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Republicans Seek to Fund Trump Ballroom After Gala Shooting
title_cn: 晚会枪击事件后，共和党人寻求资助特朗普宴会厅
summary: Key Republican senators are pushing to use federal funds for the construction of the White House ballroom President Donald Trump has planned, citing increased threats following Saturday’s shooting at the White House Correspondents’ Association dinner.

title: UK Should Have a Substantially Larger Fiscal Margin, Lords Say
title_cn: 上议院议员称英国应大幅提高财政利润
summary: UK governments must stop using their fiscal buffer as a “piggy bank” and toughen up the budget guidelines to help restore credibility with investors, according to a report by lawmakers in the House of Lords.

title: CBO Director Swagel on Calculating Federal Deficit
title_cn: 国会预算办公室主任斯瓦格尔谈联邦赤字计算
summary: CBO Director Phillip Swagel discusses how the long term fiscal outlook of the United States is looking and the adjustments the CBO has had to make to their ten year outlook following the US Supreme Court striking down on President Trump's global tariffs and the President launching a war with Iran. He speaks with Kailey Leinz and Joe Mathieu on the late edition of Bloomberg's "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Press Dinner Shooting Sparks Fresh Secret Service Scrutiny
title_cn: 新闻晚宴枪击事件引发特勤局新一轮审查
summary: A gunman’s breach of a security checkpoint at a dinner attended by President Donald Trump is set to intensify pressure on lawmakers and the Secret Service to revisit proposed structural changes, even as Congress struggles to pass basic appropriations.

title: Rep. Downing on Iran Strikes, WHCD Security, FISA
title_cn: 众议员唐宁谈伊朗袭击、WHCD 安全、FISA
summary: Congressman Troy Downing (R-MT), a member of the House Financial Services Committee, says any decision to strike Iran should not be taken lightly but must be weighed against the threat of a nuclear-armed regime, adding the US may need to “see this through.” He also says the shooting at the White House Correspondents’ Dinner underscores the need for a more secure venue, arguing “we need to build that ballroom” to better protect the president and top officials. On Capitol Hill, Rep. Downing emphasizes the need to protect Fourth Amendment rights as lawmakers consider a FISA extension while ensuring intelligence tools remain in place to monitor foreign threats. He speaks with Kailey Leinz and Joe Mathieu on the late edition of Bloomberg’s "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: WHCD Shooting Was a 'Near Miss': Security Expert
title_cn: WHCD 枪击事件“险些发生”：安全专家
summary: Donell Harvin, former DC Chief of Homeland Security and Intelligence and current faculty member at Georgetown University's School of Foreign Service, calls the shooting at Saturday's White House Correspondents' Dinner a "near miss," warning the president being within earshot of gunfire is "too close" and highlighting how "unprecedented" it is for one president to face three separate assassination attempts. He says the lack of a National Special Security Event designation and the concentration of top officials in one venue exposed vulnerabilities, even as he says the Secret Service response 'did exactly what it is supposed to do. He speaks with Kailey Leinz and Joe Mathieu on the late edition of Bloomberg's "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Welcomes King Charles at White House for State Visit
title_cn: 特朗普在白宫欢迎查尔斯国王进行国事访问
summary: US President Donald Trump welcomed King Charles III to the White House for a visit fraught with doubt about the future of Britain’s so-called special relationship with America and fresh security concerns in the wake of the shooting at the White House correspondents’ dinner. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Political Violence In Focus After White House Correspondents’ Shooting
title_cn: 白宫记者枪击事件后政治暴力成为焦点
summary: The White House will convene a meeting early this week to discuss safety measures for major events involving President Donald Trump, following Saturday’s shooting at the White House Correspondents’ Association dinner that spurred fresh scrutiny of security practices.  Frank Luntz, CEO of FIL Inc. joins Balance of Power to discuss.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Sergey Brin Sparked a Political War to Influence California
title_cn: 谢尔盖·布林引发了一场影响加州的政治战争
summary:
Eliyahu Kamisher reports on the latest in the California's race for governor and Sergey Brin's role. It was late in the evening at a Christmas party hosted by crypto titan Chris Larsen — featuring singer Janelle Monáe and a towering abominable snowman with glowing red eyes — when Brin and his partner, Gerelyn Gilbert-Soto, confronted Newsom about a new proposal to tax billionaires in California, according to people who’ve spoken with the governor. Such a levy could hit Brin’s stake in Alphabet Inc. and his $272.6 billion fortune.
Newsom, who opposes the wealth tax, was still telling people about the lengthy exchange at the party months later, complaining of a lingering cold the pair had given him, according to the people, who asked not to be named discussing private conversations with the governor. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Russian Disinformation War's Most Potent Weapon Is Bending Realities
title_cn: 俄罗斯虚假信息战争最有力的武器正在扭曲现实
summary: Storm-1516 uses fabricated videos, phony websites and anonymous influencers to spread tales about election fraud, corruption and sexual abuse.
